pass1_value.note: The help article states that if the API section is not visible you must contact support (help@seranking.com or in-app chat) to request API access; availability may depend on subscription plan.

final_value.note: Help Center states API access is under Account settings → API, but if the API section is not present you must contact SE Ranking support (via chat or email) to request/enable access, indicating access may be gated and not always self-serve.

pass1_value.note: Docs show clear REST API and token auth, but the Help Center indicates API access must be enabled by contacting support and may depend on plan; therefore automated self-serve credential issuance is not guaranteed.

final_value.note: Despite clear REST API documentation and bearer-token auth, SE Ranking indicates API access may need to be enabled by support if the API section is not available in account settings, so automated self-serve credential issuance is not guaranteed.
